About Gals Who Travel

Authentic,
women-only
adventures.

Gals Who Travel creates women-only group adventures for 18–35 year olds who want more than a holiday. Think floating bungalows, elephant sanctuaries, island hopping, and sunsets you'll talk about forever.

Join solo or with friends, meet incredible women, and travel with expert guides who know every hidden gem. 87% of our gals book solo. Nobody leaves that way.

Why travel with us

Why go further
with GWT?

Join likeminded women for the ultimate mix of adventure, connection and genuinely stress-free travel.

Learn more

Women-only groups

Every trip is 100% women-only. Join solo travellers on an unforgettable journey where you'll make genuine, lasting friendships.

Expert GWT guides

Our experienced guides ensure a smooth, safe trip. They know every hidden gem and become your best friend within hours.

GWT exclusives

Sunset kayaking & cocktails, private welcome dinners, ethical sanctuaries — moments you simply can't get anywhere else.

Beautiful hotels

Boutique hotels, resort pools, jungle lodges. Flashpacker style — the best bits of backpacking, a little bit more boujee.

Wildlife & nature

Ethical elephant sanctuaries, snorkelling with turtles, desert stargazing — experiences that stay with you forever.

Safe & fully covered

ATOL & ABTA protected. 24/7 support. £200 deposit to secure your place. Flexible payment plans included.
